title: Call with Elijah Leach — Jan 4 2026 AEO product/distribution session
html:
11:32 working call between Yahir and elijah leach at the aeo agency / Insight AI buildout stage — covering tool walkthrough, in-tool review-capture, the GEO/AEO blog generator, mailing list capture inside Superbase, the social-content distribution strategy, and Yahir going head-down ("no car, no fucking life, this is my life"). Most recent product/agency planning recording in the vault and a direct continuation of the sales-as-the-big-domino gospel Yahir absorbed in 2019.

TL;DR

  • Action item #1: elijah leach records a Loom walkthrough of the aeo agency tool — gating priority. Rest of the call is sequencing the next two weeks.
  • New idea: in-tool review prompt — once a user has been on the tool for ~1 minute, ask for a review; reviews auto-populate to the website. Elijah pushes back ("auto-populating's too much, hard-code legit ones for now") — Yahir agrees as the imperfect short term fix.
  • Blog-engine plan: pump out GEO/AEO blog posts via the generator, hard-code each post under a folder in the website code, anchor topic "how to optimize your business for perplexity AI". Required-email gate before producing the OV page → supabase table → n8n sequences.
  • Distribution strategy: skip cold outreach; aim 8–12 posts/day across 9 socials, position aeo agency as a free-value news channel for AI/AEO (share of voice / creator search insights mental model); milestone-reporting opt-in as the email-list hook.
  • Yahir frames it content creator style: "I follow content creators where I'll look at anything he sells — we have to be that" — a trust then pull out of the stock move on the audience.

Key quote

"Bro's got no car, no shot, I love it. — I have no car, no fucking life, nigga, this is my life."

Why it matters in the graph

  • The 2026 operational counterpart to Yahir's August 2019 absorption of the sales-first gospel — same max effort commit energy, applied to aeo agency in real time.
  • Establishes supabase as the email source-of-truth for the agency stack; pairs with the ai visibility engine / ai search optimization cluster.
  • elijah leach as Yahir's product-engineering partner — first in-the-flow recording of their working dynamic.

Open questions

  • "Carl" — referenced as Yahir's next meeting (free-work referral target). Single mention; potential entity once second mention surfaces.
  • "MoanaCon" — referenced as the free-work account Elijah's been building; bottlenecked on account access.

elijah leach · aeo agency · ai visibility engine · ai search optimization · supabase · n8n · perplexity · do things that dont scale · max effort commit · sahil bloom · creator search insights · share of voice
